Vendon Delay Risk Dashboard

Delays shows the machines with the highest number of daily turn-offs (Vendon). It identifies machines that are frequently turned off during the day. By ranking them based on daily turn-off counts, the team can spot recurring problem machines, investigate causes of delays, and prioritize maintenance or operational fixes. It also summarizes the total downtime per machine and how long it takes for issues to be resolved.

Loading refund tests…

Refund Tests Log

Quick ranges

📋 How Refund Tests Are Categorized

✅ Custom Refunds
Refund test matched with "Vend Failed" event within 5 minutes.
Meets Customer Service KPI - remediation credit sent successfully and timely.
🧪 Drink Tests
First refund test of day + transactions within 30 minutes.
QA department drink test functions according to product qty and type thresholds.
❓ Reason Unidentified
No failed dispense within 5 min and not within drink test window.
Could be: A. Drink Test, B. Next-day refund, C. Reason Unidentified (personal use, abrupt test, etc.)
Manual reason can be assigned for investigation.
Business Purpose:
• QA Compliance: Track daily drink test functions per machine
• Remediation Tracking: Monitor remediation credits per user per machine for failed dispenses
• Customer Service KPI: Ensure every "Vend Failed" is dealt with successfully within 5 minutes
• Machine Health: Identify machines requiring replacement if hiccups trend higher

Calculation Rules:
• Custom Refunds: Refund test matched with "Vend Failed" within 5 minutes (Customer Service KPI)
• Drink Tests: First refund test of day + transactions within 30 minutes (QA criteria - dynamic per machine)
• Reason Unidentified: Everything else - manual reason assignment available for investigation

💡 Use these averages: Apply each machine's average duration as the standard cleaning time for all staff members working on that specific machine.

Average Cleaning Duration – All Machines

Select a date range to calculate average cleaning duration for all machines. This uses cleaning sessions within the selected range only.

Quick ranges:
Machine Avg Duration Sessions Min Max
Choose a date range and click "Calculate" to see averages for all machines.

Attendance Records

Machine Date Attendance Time User Type User Name Work Start Work End Work Duration Status
Please select date range and load data

How attendance is detected:

  • ✅ Remote credit with "Vend successful"
  • ✅ 2 consecutive power events within 3 minutes
  • ✅ User detection from operators or route drivers

Work End Time Sources:

  • 🧹 Daily cleaning finish - Work ends when cleaning is completed
  • ⚡ Power events pattern - Work ends based on power event analysis

Daily Cleaning Records

Machine Date Cleaning Start Cleaning End Duration Status Analysis
Please select date range and load data

How cleaning is detected:

  • 🔄 Start: 3 consecutive power events within 3 minutes
  • ✅ End: Another 3 consecutive power events within 3 minutes
  • ⏱️ Duration: Highlighted if <5min or >30min

General Cleaning Records (Saturdays Only)

Machine Date Start Time End Time Duration Status Analysis
Please select date range and load data

General Cleaning Requirements:

  • 📅 Only on Saturdays
  • 🔄 Start: 3 consecutive power events within 3 minutes
  • ✅ End: Another 3 consecutive power events within 3 minutes

Vendon Credentials Setup

Enter your Vendon login credentials to access attendance data.

📊 Business Analytics

👥 Visitor Traffic

💰 Sales Performance (KWD)

📈 Visitors vs Sales Correlation (Real Data)

⚡ Performance vs Best Machine Comparison

Traffic Analysis

Traffic Metrics:

  • 📊 People In/Out - Count of people entering and exiting
  • 📈 Net Traffic - Difference between people in and out
  • ⏰ Time Patterns - Peak hours and traffic distribution
  • 📅 Daily Trends - Day-by-day traffic comparison
Date/Time Camera People In People Out Net Traffic Traffic Ratio Peak Indicator
Please select date range and load analytics

Sales Correlation Analysis

Sales vs Traffic:

  • 💰 Sales per Visitor - Revenue divided by people count
  • 📊 Conversion Rate - Percentage of visitors who made purchases
  • ⏰ Peak Sales Hours - Hours with highest sales-to-traffic ratio
  • 📈 Traffic Impact - How traffic affects sales performance
Date/Time People Count Sales Count Sales Amount Sales per Person Conversion Rate Efficiency Score
Please load analytics to see sales correlation

Trends & Patterns

Pattern Analysis:

  • 📊 Hourly Patterns - Traffic distribution throughout the day
  • 📅 Daily Patterns - Day-of-week traffic variations
  • 📈 Growth Trends - Traffic growth over time
  • 🔍 Anomaly Detection - Unusual traffic patterns
Time Period Avg People In Avg People Out Peak Traffic Low Traffic Trend Direction Pattern Type
Please load analytics to see trends

Show last visit date per role (Ops / Area / QC / Technician) for each location. Locations with visits older than 15 days are highlighted in red to ensure consistent store follow-ups and identify branches lacking supervision.
